videos.headline: Tawee Walker's breaks free for a 55-yard Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Tawee Walker's third touchdown of the game goes for 55 yards to pad the Badgers' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tawee Walker's breaks free for a 55-yard Wisconsin TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Pauling makes an impressive grab for a Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Will Pauling adjusts his body to make an impressive grab to put the Badgers on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Pauling makes an impressive grab for a Wisconsin TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shaquan Loyal climbs the ladder to make an athletic INT
videos.description: Shaquan Loyal shows off his vertical as he climbs the ladder to snag an interception for Rutgers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shaquan Loyal climbs the ladder to make an athletic INT) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wisconsin's 4th-down gamble pays off with a Tawee Walker TD
videos.description: Tawee Walker plows across the goal line to pad the Badgers' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wisconsin's 4th-down gamble pays off with a Tawee Walker TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wisconsin's 47-yard completion sets up a Darrion Dupree TD
videos.description: Braedyn Locke launches a beauty to Vinny Anthony II for 47 yards, which sets up a Darrion Dupree rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wisconsin's 47-yard completion sets up a Darrion Dupree TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wisconsin's INT stets up Tawee Walker's 2nd TD
videos.description: Preston Zachman's tip-drill interception sets up Tawee Walker's second touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wisconsin's INT stets up Tawee Walker's 2nd TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Braedyn Locke walks into the end zone to pad Wisconsin's lead
videos.description: Braedyn Locke trots into the end zone to give the Badgers a 42-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Braedyn Locke walks into the end zone to pad Wisconsin's lead) 2024/10/12 ESHEET
